scenario_notes.null_effect: No latent condition effect; positive raw INS/WTD is sampling and selection noise.
scenario_notes.diffuse: Every item suffers the same 8-point degradation.
scenario_notes.symmetric_churn: Equal 15-point gains and losses cancel in the mean while INS remains positive.
scenario_notes.sparse_collapse: Ten percent of items collapse by 55 points; the rest are unchanged.
scenario_notes.floor: Low baseline accuracy compresses possible degradation and makes stability ambiguous.
scenario_notes.ceiling: Nominally balanced gains/losses are asymmetrically compressed at the ceiling.

interpretation.baseline_floor: Raw minus the estimated baseline-only pseudo-null expectation; untruncated.
interpretation.split_tail: Unbiased for the noisy-selected set, not necessarily the oracle latent tail.
interpretation.absolute_tail: Perturbed-condition loss, separate from condition-to-condition WTD.
